interpretation: SASH3 (SAM and SH3 domain-containing protein 3) is a protein that may function as a signaling adapter in lymphocytes, which are crucial for immune responses. While there is no direct evidence linking SASH3 to Steroid-Induced Osteonecrosis of the Femoral Head (SONFH), its role in immune signaling could suggest a potential indirect connection, as immune dysregulation is often implicated in various bone pathologies, including osteonecrosis. The retrieved evidence primarily discusses SASH3's involvement in immunodeficiency disorders, which may relate to inflammatory processes that could affect bone health. However, the lack of specific studies connecting SASH3 to SONFH limits the strength of this association. Therefore, while SASH3 may have some relevance in the context of immune signaling, its potential as a biomarker for early detection of SONFH is weak and not well-supported by the current evidence.
relevance_summary: SASH3 may be involved in immune signaling, but lacks direct evidence linking it to Steroid-Induced Osteonecrosis of the Femoral Head.

result.title: SASH3 ↔ immunodeficiency 102
result.text:
Disease: immunodeficiency 102
Description: An X-linked recessive immunologic disorder characterized by the onset of recurrent sinopulmonary, mucosal, and other infections in early childhood, usually accompanied by refractory autoimmune cytopenias. Affected individuals have bacterial, viral, and fungal infections, as well as hemolytic anemia, thrombocytopenia, lymphopenia, and decreased NK cells. Laboratory studies show defective T-cell proliferation and function, likely due to signaling abnormalities. The disorder may also manifest as a hyperinflammatory state with immune dysregulation.
Association score: 0.704

result.title: SASH3 ↔ X-Linked Combined Immunodeficiency Diseases
result.text:
Disease: X-Linked Combined Immunodeficiency Diseases
Description: Forms of combined immunodeficiency caused by mutations in the gene for INTERLEUKIN RECEPTOR COMMON GAMMA SUBUNIT. Both severe and non-severe subtypes of the disease have been identified.
Association score: 0.381

result.title: SASH3 ↔ Immunodeficiency
result.text:
Disease: Immunodeficiency
Description: Failure of the immune system to protect the body adequately from infection, due to the absence or insufficiency of some component process or substance.
Association score: 0.120

result.title: SASH3 ↔ cancer
result.text:
Disease: cancer
Description: A tumor composed of atypical neoplastic, often pleomorphic cells that invade other tissues. Malignant neoplasms often metastasize to distant anatomic sites and may recur after excision. The most common malignant neoplasms are carcinomas (adenocarcinomas or squamous cell carcinomas), Hodgkin and non-Hodgkin lymphomas, leukemias, melanomas, and sarcomas.
Association score: 0.076
